name: files-serve-preview
description: Per-CWD live-preview server (Vite/serve/python -m http.server) — REST handlers for start/stop/status/logs at /v1/serve/*. The runtime library bridge/files/serve.ts stays in core because its buildServeProxyMiddleware(), handleProxyUpgrade() and killAllSync() are wired directly into server.ts (proxy mount, WS-upgrade hook, shutdown drain) — moving it would break the /proxy/serve/:id reverse proxy.
